targetPlan.finalGoal: Production Representative Sandbox produces local Git repositories with real validation command evidence.
phaseGoals: sandbox-contract: verify the representative manifest, schemas, templates, and release evidence rule
repository-generation: create local Git repositories from templates
repository-validation: run each representative project's real validation commands
fault-boundary: prove the configured quality-gate fault remains a release blocker before repair
acceptanceCriteria: generated representative projects are real local Git repositories
all configured project validation commands exit 0
fault injection fails where configured and is reported as release-blocking evidence
no template-only, smoke-only, mock-only, or chat-only evidence is counted as release evidence

targetPlanConfirmation.instruction: Run local production representative sandbox evidence without external target-product registration claims.

releaseDecision.source: runner coverage matrix and final report

blockerPolicy.reason: Production representative local evidence blockers require sandbox repair before release evidence can be used.
blockerPolicy.nextAction: Repair the representative sandbox or generated project validation failure, then rerun the profile.

steps.requiredEvidence: create-projects.py --force creates local Git repositories and runs validation commands
verify-sandbox.py --generated exits 0 against generated local Git repositories
verify-sandbox.py --generated --include-fault proves the configured fault command fails as a release blocker
